movesList.name: qcf
inputs: :  Roll the joystick from d to f  (d,df,f)

movesList.name: qcb
inputs: :  Roll the joystick from d to b  (d,db,b)

movesList.name: hcf
inputs: :  Roll the joystick from b to d to f  (b,db,d,df,f)

movesList.name: hcb
inputs: :  Roll the joystick from f to d to b  (f,df,d,db,b)
